title: Developer Tooling & Config (gitignore, Jolli, Claude)
content:
## Overview

The project's `.gitignore` is configured to exclude several tool-specific local directories from version control: `.jolli/` (Jolli tool artifacts) and `.claude/` (Claude Code local settings).

## `.jolli` Directory

The `.jolli` directory is a local artifact produced by the Jolli tool. It is intentionally excluded from the repository via `.gitignore` to avoid committing machine-specific or generated state.

### Rationale

- Keeps the repository clean of tool-generated noise.
- Prevents accidental commits of local Jolli state that would not be meaningful or portable across developer environments.

## `.claude` Directory

The entire `.claude/` directory is excluded from the repository via `.gitignore`. This directory contains Claude Code local settings, which are machine-specific and not intended to be shared or tracked in version control.

### Rationale

- Claude Code local settings are developer-environment-specific and not portable.
- Excluding the full directory (rather than individual files within it) ensures all current and future Claude Code local artifacts remain untracked.
